query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_professors,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.research_field) as unique_fields,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.field_name IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_images
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN research_field_images r ON p.research_field = r.field_name
WHERE p.research_field IS NOT NULL;
